mapper.sql: select id, program_id, year, admitted_count, first_choice_admitted_count, min_admitted_score, avg_admitted_score, max_admitted_score, has_transfer, verify_status, source_id, created_at from admission_result
mapper.insert: insert into admission_result (program_id, year, admitted_count, first_choice_admitted_count, min_admitted_score, avg_admitted_score, max_admitted_score, has_transfer, verify_status, source_id) values (#{programId}, #{year}, #{admittedCount}, #{firstChoiceAdmittedCount}, #{minAdmittedScore}, #{avgAdmittedScore}, #{maxAdmittedScore}, #{hasTransfer}, #{verifyStatus}, #{sourceId})
mapper.delete:
delete from admission_result where id in
#{id}
